name: Dompe
role: Failed Berlin techno DJ / tragic lead
personality: Talented, desperate, easily humiliated, allergic to success, still believes the next gig will save him.
visual_description: Mid 30s, heavy eye bags, messy hair, skinny frame, nervous posture, permanently exhausted face.
outfit_rules: Washed-out black techno hoodie, cheap black jeans, battered sneakers, old headphones around the neck.
face_rules: Large tired eyes, twitchy eyebrows, long stressed mouth shapes, never looks fully relaxed.
catchphrases: Ich bin nicht gescheitert, ich baue noch Brand Awareness.

name: Tariq
personality: Calm, rich, cold, polite in the most threatening way possible.
visual_description: Fluffy white Persian cat with dead serious eyes, tiny gold chain, clean fur, dominant table presence.
outfit_rules: Tiny gold chain or silk scarf only. Never goofy. Looks cute but acts like a cartel CEO.
face_rules: Half-closed eyes, calm stare, tiny smug mouth, always composed.

name: Hassan
personality: Silent, brutal, impatient, solves every problem physically.
visual_description: Compact gray street cat, one damaged ear, facial scar, cold eyes, low aggressive posture.
outfit_rules: No costume. Optional tiny leather vest. Criminal props stay small and absurd.
face_rules: Narrow eyes, almost no smile, scar must stay visible, one ear always damaged.

name: DJ VØID
visual_description: Tall performer in expensive black outfit with a huge black LED trashcan-like helmet.
outfit_rules: Always black. Helmet stays on until the joke requires humiliation.
face_rules: Face is usually hidden. When revealed: boring business student with side parting.
catchphrases: Ich spiele nicht Musik, ich kuratiere Kontrollverlust.

name: Svenni
personality: Emotionless, arbitrary, brutal about vibe politics.
visual_description: Two meters tall, face tattoos, black bomber jacket, dead eyes, clipboard power.
outfit_rules: Black bomber jacket, black boots, tiny earpiece, always blocking a doorway.
face_rules: Flat stare, almost no expression, jaw like a concrete block.
